name: DropboxConnector
description: Connects to the Dropbox REST API v2 (Files, Sharing, Users) via OAuth 2.0. Supports recursive folder listing, file metadata, upload/download, copy/move/delete, search, revisions, shared links, account/space queries, and KB sync of all Dropbox files/folders.

install_fields.label: Dropbox App Key
install_fields.help: From https://www.dropbox.com/developers/apps → your app → Settings → App key. Used as the OAuth2 client_id.

install_fields.label: Dropbox App Secret
install_fields.help: From your Dropbox App's Settings page. Sent only in token exchange — never to a browser.

install_fields.label: Token URL
install_fields.help: OAuth2 token endpoint. Leave blank to use the Dropbox default.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id + client_secret and persists install-time config. No API call.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: Exchange the OAuth2 authorization code for access + refresh tokens.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: POST /users/get_current_account — verifies Dropbox API connectivity and token validity.

apis.name: Sync Files
apis.description: Recursively list every file and folder via /files/list_folder (cursor pagination) and ingest into the KB.

apis.name: List Folder
apis.description: POST /files/list_folder — list entries in a Dropbox folder.

apis.name: List Folder (Continue)
apis.description: POST /files/list_folder/continue — cursor pagination.

apis.name: Get Metadata
apis.description: POST /files/get_metadata — fetch metadata for a file or folder by path.

apis.name: Download File
apis.description: POST https://content.dropboxapi.com/2/files/download — returns base64-encoded content + metadata.

apis.name: Upload File
apis.description: POST https://content.dropboxapi.com/2/files/upload — write binary content to a Dropbox path.

apis.name: Copy File
apis.description: POST /files/copy_v2.

apis.name: Move File
apis.description: POST /files/move_v2.

apis.name: Delete File
apis.description: POST /files/delete_v2.

apis.name: Create Folder
apis.description: POST /files/create_folder_v2.

apis.name: Search Files
apis.description: POST /files/search_v2 — full-text search across the user's Dropbox.

apis.name: List Revisions
apis.description: POST /files/list_revisions.

apis.name: Restore Revision
apis.description: POST /files/restore — restore a file to a previous revision.

apis.name: Create Shared Link
apis.description: POST /sharing/create_shared_link_with_settings.

apis.name: List Shared Links
apis.description: POST /sharing/list_shared_links.

apis.name: Get Current Account
apis.description: POST /users/get_current_account.

apis.name: Get Account
apis.description: POST /users/get_account — fetch another user's public profile.

apis.name: Get Space Usage
apis.description: POST /users/get_space_usage.

apis.name: Disconnect
apis.description: POST /2/auth/token/revoke and clear local token storage.
